_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for G.I. Joe team ARAH characters

data.name: Breaker (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Young clean-shaven man with brown hair wearing olive-green military fatigues and a communications headset with boom microphone. Carries a portable radio pack on his back and is often seen chewing bubble gum.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Clutch (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Scruffy dark-haired man with a five-o'clock shadow wearing an olive-green military uniform with a brown leather jacket. Typically seen driving the VAMP jeep.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Flash (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in red-padded laser-resistant uniform with silver visor helmet. Equipped with a large laser rifle mounted on a tripod.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Grand Slam (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in red-padded laser-resistant uniform similar to Flash with a silver visor helmet. Operates the HAL laser artillery platform.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Grunt (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Brown-haired infantryman in standard olive-green military fatigues with a green helmet. Carries an M-16 rifle and standard infantry gear.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Hawk (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Brown-haired commanding officer in a tan bomber jacket over olive-green military uniform. Wears a peaked officer's cap and carries a sidearm. Later depicted in brown flight jacket with gold-brown hair.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Rock 'n Roll (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Tall, muscular blond man with a full beard wearing olive-green military fatigues and a green beret. Carries a heavy M-60 machine gun.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Scarlett (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Athletic woman with long red hair tied in a ponytail wearing a tan and light-blue bodysuit with a crossbow slung over her shoulder. Trained in martial arts and intelligence.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Short-Fuze (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Brown-haired man with glasses wearing olive-green military fatigues and a green helmet. Operates a portable mortar launcher.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Snake Eyes (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Mysterious ninja commando in all-black bodysuit with matching balaclava and visor completely concealing his face. Equipped with an Uzi submachine gun and katana sword. Accompanied by his wolf Timber.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Stalker (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: African-American man with a black beret wearing olive-green camouflage fatigues with brown web gear. Carries an M-32 submachine gun. Natural leader with a calm, authoritative demeanor.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Steeler (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Brown-haired man in olive-green tank crew uniform with a padded helmet and goggles. Operates the MOBAT tank.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Zap (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Hispanic man with a mustache wearing olive-green military fatigues and a green helmet. Carries a portable bazooka and rocket launcher.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Ace (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Fighter pilot in a white flight suit with blue trim and a white flight helmet with dark visor. Pilots the Skystriker XP-14F jet.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Airborne (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Native American man with black hair wearing olive-green helicopter assault gear with a flight helmet. Trained as a helicopter assault trooper.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cover Girl (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Attractive woman with brown hair wearing a tan tank driver's uniform with a brown leather jacket. Former fashion model who serves as the Wolverine tank driver.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Doc (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: African-American man with a mustache wearing a white medical coat over olive-green fatigues. Carries medical equipment and a first aid kit.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Duke (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Athletic blond-haired man in tan military uniform with brown boots and web gear. Clean-cut appearance with short hair. Often seen with binoculars and an M-16 rifle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Gung-Ho (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Muscular bare-chested man with a Marine Corps tattoo on his chest, wearing blue marine pants and a blue campaign cover hat. Shaved head with a strong jaw. Carries a grenade launcher.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Snow Job (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Red-bearded man in all-white arctic gear with white parka, pants, and ski goggles on his forehead. Carries ski poles and a rifle. Olympic-caliber biathlete.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Torpedo (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in a dark blue wetsuit with flippers and diving gear. Wears a diving mask pushed up on his forehead. Navy SEAL trained in underwater demolitions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Tripwire (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in olive-green padded bomb disposal suit with a clear face shield visor. Carries a mine detector and is notoriously clumsy despite his explosive ordnance specialty.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Wild Bill (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Tall Texan with a brown cowboy hat, handlebar mustache, and aviator sunglasses. Wears a brown flight suit. Pilots the Dragonfly helicopter.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Blowtorch (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in a yellow and red fire-resistant suit with a padded helmet and clear visor. Carries a large backpack-mounted flamethrower.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cutter (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man with blond hair and a blue Coast Guard uniform with a white officer's cap. Pilots the Whale hovercraft.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Deep Six (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in a bulky yellow deep-sea diving suit with a large round helmet and porthole visor. Operates the SHARC submarine vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Mutt (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in olive-green military uniform with a brown muzzled dog handler's gear and a green beret. Always accompanied by his attack dog Junkyard, a brown and black Rottweiler.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Recondo (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in green jungle camouflage with a wide-brimmed bush hat and a thick brown mustache. Carries a rifle and jungle survival equipment.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Rip Cord (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: African-American man in olive-green jumpsuit with parachute harness and gear. Wears a brown flight helmet with visor. HALO jump specialist.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Roadblock (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Large, powerfully built African-American man with a flat-top haircut wearing olive-green fatigues with a brown vest. Carries the massive Browning M2 .50 caliber machine gun. Known for speaking in rhyme.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Spirit (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Native American man with long black hair and a red headband. Wears fringed buckskin-colored uniform with blue pants. Accompanied by his bald eagle Freedom.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Thunder (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green military uniform with a padded tank crew helmet and goggles. Operates the Slugger self-propelled gun vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Airtight (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in a bright yellow hazmat suit with a large clear dome helmet and built-in air filtration system. Carries chemical detection equipment and a sniffer device.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Alpine (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: African-American man with a mustache wearing orange and white mountain climbing gear with a green knit cap. Carries climbing rope, pitons, and an ice axe.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Barbecue (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in a light-blue fire fighter's uniform with a yellow fire helmet and face shield. Carries a large fire extinguisher and firefighting axe.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Bazooka (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Stocky man wearing a red football jersey with the number 14 over olive-green pants and a green helmet. Carries a large missile launcher on his shoulder.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Crankcase (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green military uniform with a padded helmet and goggles. Drives the AWE Striker assault vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Dusty (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in tan desert camouflage uniform with a tan cloth head wrap and goggles. Carries a rifle and desert survival gear. Specialist in arid environments.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Flint (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Brown-haired man with a confident demeanor wearing olive-green fatigues with a brown beret and a black shotgun holster on his chest. Carries a shotgun. Often seen alongside Lady Jaye.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Footloose (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Laid-back man with brown hair wearing standard olive-green infantry fatigues with a green helmet and brown web gear. Carries an M-16 rifle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Frostbite (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in white arctic parka with fur-lined hood and snow goggles. Drives the Snow Cat arctic assault vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Heavy Metal (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green tank crew uniform with a padded helmet and communications headset. Operates the Mauler M.B.T. tank.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Keel-Haul (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Naval officer with gray hair and a stern expression wearing a white Navy admiral's uniform with gold trim. Commands the USS Flagg aircraft carrier.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Lady Jaye (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Athletic woman with short brown hair wearing olive-green fatigues with a brown leather jacket and a green garrison cap. Carries javelins as her signature weapon. Often paired with Flint.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Quick Kick (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Asian-American man with black hair wearing no shirt, just white martial arts pants and bare feet. Carries a katana sword and nunchucks. Hollywood stuntman turned martial arts specialist.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Shipwreck (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Sailor with a black beard and a white Navy dixie cup hat. Wears a blue Navy uniform with a white sailor collar. Always accompanied by his green parrot Polly. Fan-favorite wise-cracking character.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Sgt. Slaughter (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Massive, barrel-chested drill instructor with a square jaw wearing a campaign cover hat, mirrored sunglasses, and olive-green drill instructor uniform. Based on the real professional wrestler.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Starduster (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in a silver and blue jet pack trooper uniform with a flight helmet. Mail-in exclusive figure equipped with a jet pack for aerial operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Tollbooth (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man with brown hair wearing olive-green engineer fatigues with a hard hat. Operates the Toss 'N Cross bridge layer vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Beach Head (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Tough man in olive-green Ranger fatigues wearing a green balaclava that covers most of his face, leaving only his eyes visible. Carries an assault rifle and is known for his gruff, no-nonsense attitude.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Claymore (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green military fatigues with face camouflage paint. Anti-terrorist specialist from the Special Mission: Brazil set, a Toys 'R' Us exclusive.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cross-Country (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Red-haired man with a bushy mustache wearing a brown leather vest over olive-green fatigues and a brown cowboy hat. Country music enthusiast who drives the H.A.V.O.C. vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Dial-Tone (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man with reddish-brown hair and glasses wearing tan and olive-green communications specialist gear with a headset and portable radio equipment.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Iceberg (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Large African-American man in white arctic combat gear with a white parka and snow goggles. Despite being from Brownsville, Texas, he is the team's arctic trooper.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Leatherneck (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Tough-looking man with brown hair wearing olive-green Marine uniform with a green beret and brown web gear. Carries an M-16 rifle. Has a rivalry with Wet-Suit.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Lifeline (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man with brown hair in a red and white medic uniform with a Red Cross symbol. Pacifist who refuses to carry weapons, relying only on medical equipment and a stretcher.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Lift-Ticket (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in olive-green flight suit with a white flight helmet and dark visor. Pilots the Tomahawk helicopter.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Low-Light (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in dark olive-green and black uniform with night-vision goggles pushed up on his forehead. Carries a sniper rifle with a large scope. Operates primarily at night.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Mainframe (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man with blond hair and glasses wearing a tan uniform with computer specialist equipment. Carries a portable computer terminal and is the team's tech expert.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Sci-Fi (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in distinctive bright green laser-resistant armor suit with a green helmet and translucent green visor. Carries a futuristic laser rifle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Slip-Stream (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Fighter pilot in a gray and blue flight suit with a blue flight helmet and dark visor. Pilots the Conquest X-30 fighter jet.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Wet-Suit (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in a dark blue Navy SEAL wetsuit with diving gear and flippers. Has a rivalry with Leatherneck despite being close friends.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Avalanche (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in white and blue Battle Force 2000 snow vehicle uniform with a white helmet. Member of the futuristic Battle Force 2000 sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Backstop (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green military uniform with a padded helmet. Canadian vehicle driver who operates the Persuader tank.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Blaster (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in blue and white Battle Force 2000 pilot uniform with a flight helmet. Pilots the Vindicator hovercraft for the Battle Force 2000 sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Blocker (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in blue and silver Battle Force 2000 driver's uniform with a helmet. Drives the Eliminator vehicle for the Battle Force 2000 sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Chuckles (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man with brown hair wearing a loud Hawaiian shirt as his undercover disguise, over tan pants. Carries a concealed pistol. Undercover operative who blends into civilian environments.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Crazylegs (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in olive-green paratrooper uniform with an orange parachute harness and green helmet. Assault trooper specializing in airborne operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Dodger (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in blue and gray Battle Force 2000 uniform with a helmet. Drives the Marauder motorcycle for the Battle Force 2000 sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Falcon (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Brown-haired Green Beret with a cocky attitude wearing olive-green fatigues with a green beret and brown web gear. Duke's half-brother. Featured prominently in G.I. Joe: The Movie.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Fast Draw (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in a bright red and white mobile missile specialist suit with a large helmet and shoulder-mounted missile launcher system.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Hardtop (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in a blue and white shuttle crew uniform. Operates the Defiant Space Vehicle Launch Complex ground vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Jinx (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Asian woman in a red ninja outfit with a matching hood and sash. Carries dual katana swords. Member of the Arashikage ninja clan. Featured in G.I. Joe: The Movie.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Knockdown (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in blue Battle Force 2000 uniform with an anti-aircraft specialist helmet. Operates the Sky Sweeper anti-aircraft vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Law & Order (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Military policeman in olive-green MP uniform with a white MP helmet and armband. Always accompanied by his German Shepherd police dog Order.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Maverick (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in blue and white Battle Force 2000 flight suit with a flight helmet and visor. Fighter pilot for the Battle Force 2000 sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Mercer (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man with brown hair wearing a blue shirt and tan pants, a former Cobra Viper who defected. Part of Sgt. Slaughter's Renegades. Appeared in the Sunbow cartoon special.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Outback (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Rugged man with blond hair and a thick mustache wearing a tan sleeveless shirt showing muscular arms, olive-green pants, and brown boots. Survivalist who carries a flashlight and survival knife.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Payload (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Astronaut in a white and orange spacesuit with a helmet and dark visor. Operates aboard the Defiant Space Vehicle Launch Complex shuttle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Psyche-Out (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man with blond hair wearing olive-green fatigues with a high-tech radar dish headset used for psychological operations. Carries electronic warfare equipment.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Red Dog (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Large Samoan man with a muscular build wearing red and gray combat gear. Former football player and member of Sgt. Slaughter's Renegades.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Rumbler (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green military uniform with a helmet. Drives the A.P.C. (Armored Personnel Carrier).
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Sneak Peek (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in olive-green camouflage uniform with a boonie hat and large binoculars. Advanced recon specialist who operates behind enemy lines.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Steam-Roller (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green military uniform with a helmet and headset. Drives the Mobile Command Center vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Steel Brigade (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Generic trooper in olive-green military fatigues with a distinctive gold-visored helmet. Mail-order customizable figure where buyers could choose their own name and specialty.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Taurus (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Large muscular man with a shaved head wearing red and gray combat gear. Former circus acrobat and member of Sgt. Slaughter's Renegades.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Tunnel Rat (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Asian-American man from Brooklyn with black hair wearing olive-green fatigues with a headlamp and demolition equipment. Specializes in underground tunnel operations and bomb disposal.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Armadillo (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green military uniform with a helmet. Drives the Rolling Thunder mobile missile launcher vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Blizzard (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in white arctic combat fatigues with a white ski mask and snow goggles. Carries skis and an assault rifle for arctic attack operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Budo (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in red and gold samurai-inspired armor with a traditional kabuto helmet. Carries a katana sword and practices the way of the samurai.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Charbroil (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in a yellow and red flame-resistant suit with a helmet and visor. Carries a large backpack-mounted flamethrower weapon.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Ghostrider (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Pilot in a gray and black flight suit with a black flight helmet and dark visor. Flies the Phantom X-19 stealth fighter jet.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Hardball (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green and red uniform with a baseball cap. Baseball-themed multi-shot grenadier who carries a grenade launcher resembling a pitching machine.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Hit & Run (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in dark green and brown camouflage fatigues with face paint and a brown beret. Light infantryman specializing in stealth operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Lightfoot (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green explosives expert uniform with a padded vest and helmet. Carries demolition equipment and charges.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Muskrat (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green and brown swamp camouflage with a boonie hat. Swamp fighter who carries a machete and shotgun for wetland operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Repeater (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green fatigues with a large steadi-cam mounted machine gun harness system. Heavy weapons specialist with a distinctive stabilized firing platform.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Shockwave (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in dark blue S.W.A.T. tactical uniform with body armor, a blue helmet with visor, and tactical vest. Carries a submachine gun.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Skidmark (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in tan desert uniform with a helmet and goggles. Drives the Desert Fox 6WD vehicle across sandy terrain.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Spearhead & Max (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green point man uniform with a brown beret and camouflage face paint. Accompanied by his bobcat companion Max.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Super Trooper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in silver and blue armored uniform with a silver helmet. Mail-in exclusive special operations trooper.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Wild Card (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green military uniform with a helmet. Drives the Mean Dog triple-vehicle assault platform.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Windmill (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Pilot in a blue and white flight suit with a flight helmet. Flies the Skystorm X-Wing Chopper helicopter.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Backblast (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in olive-green and brown anti-aircraft uniform with a helmet. Carries a large shoulder-fired anti-aircraft missile launcher.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Countdown (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Astronaut in a white and orange spacesuit with a flight helmet. Fighter pilot and astronaut who later joined the Star Brigade sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Dee-Jay (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man with brown hair wearing olive-green communications specialist gear with a headset and radio equipment. Appeared in the DIC cartoon series.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Dogfight (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Pilot in a tan and brown flight suit with a flight helmet and dark visor. Flies the Mudfighter ground-attack airplane.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Downtown (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green mortar crew uniform with a helmet and communications gear. Operates a portable mortar system.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Hot Seat (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green military uniform with a helmet. Drives the Raider assault vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Long Range (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green artillery crew uniform with a helmet and targeting equipment. Operates the Thunderclap long-range artillery vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Recoil (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green long-range recon patrol uniform with a boonie hat and camouflage face paint. Carries a sniper rifle for extended operations behind enemy lines.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Scoop (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in tan and green journalist gear with a camera and microphone equipment. Combat information specialist who doubles as a military journalist.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Windchill (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in white arctic driver's uniform with a helmet and goggles. Drives the Arctic Blast snow vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Ambush (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in green and brown ghillie-style camouflage suit with extensive foliage covering. Concealment specialist who blends into natural environments.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Airwave (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in silver and blue Sky Patrol uniform with a parachute harness and communications gear. Audible frequency specialist for the Sky Patrol sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Altitude (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in silver and blue Sky Patrol uniform with reconnaissance equipment. Recon scout for the Sky Patrol sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Bullhorn (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in olive-green uniform with a blue beret and sunglasses. Hostage negotiator who carries a megaphone and sidearm. Appeared in the DIC cartoon series.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Captain Grid-Iron (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Athletic man in olive-green uniform with football-style shoulder pads and a helmet with face guard. West Point football star turned hand-to-hand combat specialist. Appeared in the DIC cartoon.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Cold Front (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in white and blue arctic driver's uniform with a helmet and goggles. Drives the Avalanche snow vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Drop Zone (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in silver and blue Sky Patrol uniform with a parachute harness. Parachutist for the Sky Patrol sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Freefall (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in green and brown paratrooper uniform with a parachute pack and helmet. Airborne specialist trained in high-altitude jumps.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Major Storm (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Officer in olive-green military uniform with a peaked officer's cap and gold insignia. General commander who drives specialized command vehicles.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Pathfinder (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in green jungle assault uniform with a boonie hat and machete. Jungle assault trooper equipped for dense vegetation operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Rampart (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in blue and gray shoreline defense uniform with a helmet. Coastal defense specialist equipped with heavy weaponry.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Salvo (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Large muscular man in olive-green fatigues with a red bandana and multiple rocket launchers strapped to his body. Anti-armor trooper who carries massive ordnance. Appeared in the DIC cartoon.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Skydive (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in silver and blue Sky Patrol leader's uniform with a parachute harness and command equipment. Leader of the Sky Patrol sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Static Line (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in silver and blue Sky Patrol uniform with an assault trooper's gear and parachute harness. Assault trooper for the Sky Patrol sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Stretcher (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in white and olive-green medic's uniform with a Red Cross armband and medical equipment. Field medic who carries a stretcher and first aid supplies.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Sub-Zero (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Man in white arctic combat uniform with a white hood, snow goggles, and fur-trimmed parka. Winter operations specialist. Appeared in the DIC cartoon series.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Updraft (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Pilot in olive-green flight suit with a flight helmet and visor. Flies the Retaliator helicopter.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Big Ben (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: British S.A.S. trooper with brown hair wearing green and brown camouflage uniform with a green beret. Carries an assault rifle and combat knife. Appeared in the DIC cartoon series.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Clean-Sweep (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in bright green and yellow Eco-Warriors environmental suit with a helmet and filtration mask. Anti-toxin trooper who carries hazardous waste cleanup equipment.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cloudburst (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in brown and tan Air Commandos glider pilot uniform. Operates a hand-launched glider for covert aerial reconnaissance.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Heavy Duty (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Large African-American man in olive-green heavy ordnance uniform with ammunition belts. Roadblock's cousin who carries a heavy machine gun.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Major Altitude (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Pilot in olive-green flight suit with a blue flight helmet. Flies the Battle Copter attack helicopter.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Ozone (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in bright green and white Eco-Warriors environmental suit with a helmet and oxygen pack. Astro-infantry trooper who later joined Star Brigade.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Rapid Fire (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green fast-attack specialist uniform with a rapid-fire weapon system. Carries multiple automatic weapons for suppressive fire operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Skymate (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in tan and green Air Commandos glider trooper uniform. Uses a hand-launched glider for aerial assault and reconnaissance missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Barricade (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in olive-green and brown bunker buster uniform with a helmet and demolition gear. Specializes in fortification assault and demolitions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Bullet-Proof (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: African-American man in olive-green and black D.E.F. tactical uniform with body armor and a badge. Leader of the Drug Elimination Force sub-team. Appeared in the DIC cartoon series.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Dojo (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in white and blue Ninja Force martial arts uniform with a black belt. Weapons specialist who carries a bo staff and various martial arts weapons.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: General Flagg (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Military officer in olive-green dress uniform with gold rank insignia and a peaked officer's cap. Son of the original General Flagg from the Marvel Comics series.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Nunchuk (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in blue and white Ninja Force uniform with a black headband. Nunchaku specialist who carries his signature weapon along with other ninja gear.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: T'Jbang (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in red and black Ninja Force uniform with a hood. Swordsman who carries a katana and specializes in bladed weapons combat.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Blast-Off (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in green and purple Mega Marines armored suit with a helmet. Flamethrower specialist for the Mega Marines sub-team equipped with bio-armor.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Bushido (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in white and blue Ninja Force snow warrior uniform with a hood and face mask. Carries a katana for cold-weather ninja operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Colonel Courage (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Officer in olive-green military dress uniform with gold colonel rank insignia and a peaked cap. Administrative strategist who coordinates field operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Mirage (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in green and purple Mega Marines armored suit with a helmet. Rocket-fire assault specialist for the Mega Marines sub-team equipped with bio-armor.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: T'Gin-Zu (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Man in orange and black Ninja Force uniform. Pile driver operator who combines ninja training with heavy equipment expertise.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Action Marine (ARAH Toy)
data.description: 30th Anniversary commemorative figure in olive-green Marine Corps uniform modeled after the original 1964 G.I. Joe 12-inch figure, scaled down to 3.75 inches.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Action Pilot (ARAH Toy)
data.description: 30th Anniversary commemorative figure in olive-green Air Force pilot uniform with a flight cap, modeled after the original 1964 G.I. Joe figure.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Action Sailor (ARAH Toy)
data.description: 30th Anniversary commemorative figure in Navy sailor's white uniform with a dixie cup hat, modeled after the original 1964 G.I. Joe figure.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Action Soldier (ARAH Toy)
data.description: 30th Anniversary commemorative figure in olive-green Army infantry uniform with a helmet, modeled after the original 1964 G.I. Joe figure.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero
